text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 71 

ENRLMT_START_DT 

LABEL: Enrollment Start Date (Within Calendar Year) 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates the date at which a beneficiary’s enrollment in Medicaid or CHIP became effective. If the 
enrollment episode begins before January 1 of the calendar year, this date is edited to January 1 of the 
calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: ENRLMT_START_DT 

LONG NAME: ENRLMT_START_DT
